content.query:
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_csv/year=2020/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [result];

-- Leer metadata

SELECT
    TOP 100
    result.filename() AS file_name,
    result.filepath() AS file_name,
    result.*
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_csv/year=2020/**',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS result;

-- Leer Parquet

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/part-00000-tid-6133789922049958496-2e489315-890a-4453-ae93-a104be9a6f06-106-1-c000.snappy.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

-- Leer Delta

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_delta',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS [result]
